results.body:
The city will temporarily shut down the intersection of Hover Street and CO 119 from June 28 due to roof work at the library. Residents and local drivers should plan alternative routes or expect delays during this time.

This closure affects traffic patterns in the area, impacting both Hover Street and CO 119. The city advises drivers to seek detours to avoid the intersection during the scheduled hours of operation from June 28 onwards [Source](evidence:18).

The library will hold a contract vot

results.body:
The City of Longmont has updated its official public information page, providing detailed insights into various departments and their roles within the city government [Source](evidence:17). Residents can explore a range of resources including press releases, community news, and updates on municipal operations. The latest news section features articles such as "Graphic Novels Offer Unique Literacy Skills," highlighting current initiatives aimed at engaging the community.
